queries: (("Polycystic Ovary Syndrome"[MeSH Terms] OR "polycystic ovary syndrome"[tiab] OR "polycystic ovarian syndrome"[tiab] OR PCOS[tiab] OR "Stein-Leventhal"[tiab]) AND ("neck circumference"[tiab] OR "neck girth"[tiab] OR "neck size"[tiab] OR "neck adiposity"[tiab] OR "neck fat"[tiab] OR "upper-body adiposity"[tiab] OR "upper body adiposity"[tiab] OR "neck perimeter"[tiab])) AND (Female[MeSH Terms] OR women[tiab] OR female*[tiab])

(("Polycystic Ovary Syndrome"[MeSH Terms] OR "polycystic ovary syndrome"[tiab] OR PCOS[tiab]) AND ("neck circumference"[tiab] OR "neck girth"[tiab] OR "neck size"[tiab])) AND (("Metabolic Syndrome"[MeSH Terms] OR "metabolic syndrome"[tiab]) OR ("Insulin Resistance"[MeSH Terms] OR "insulin resistance"[tiab] OR "HOMA-IR"[tiab] OR "homeostatic model assessment"[tiab] OR "HOMA index"[tiab] OR "HOMA S"[tiab] OR "HOMA-%S"[tiab] OR "HOMA%S"[tiab] OR "insulin sensitivity"[tiab] OR "fasting insulin"[tiab]) OR ("Blood Pressure"[MeSH Terms] OR "blood pressure"[tiab] OR hypertension[tiab]) OR ("Waist Circumference"[MeSH Terms] OR "waist circumference"[tiab] OR "Hip"[MeSH Terms] OR "hip circumference"[tiab] OR "Anthropometry"[MeSH Terms] OR anthropometric*[tiab]) OR ("Triglycerides"[MeSH Terms] OR triglyceride*[tiab] OR "Dyslipidemias"[MeSH Terms] OR dyslipid*[tiab] OR "Lipids"[MeSH Terms]) OR ("Blood Glucose"[MeSH Terms] OR "Glucose Tolerance Test"[MeSH Terms] OR "glucose tolerance"[tiab] OR "fasting glucose"[tiab] OR hyperglyc*[tiab] OR "Glycated Hemoglobin A"[MeSH Terms] OR HbA1c[tiab] OR A1c[tiab]))

(("Polycystic Ovary Syndrome"[MeSH Terms] OR "polycystic ovary syndrome"[tiab] OR PCOS[tiab]) AND ("neck circumference"[tiab] OR "neck girth"[tiab] OR "neck size"[tiab])) AND ((Case-Control Studies[MeSH Terms] OR Cohort Studies[MeSH Terms] OR Cross-Sectional Studies[MeSH Terms] OR "comparative study"[Publication Type]) OR ("case control"[tiab] OR "case-control"[tiab] OR cohort*[tiab] OR "cross-sectional"[tiab] OR observational[tiab] OR "healthy control*"[tiab] OR control*[tiab] OR "non-PCOS"[tiab] OR "without PCOS"[tiab]))

(("Polycystic Ovary Syndrome"[MeSH Terms] OR "polycystic ovary syndrome"[tiab] OR PCOS[tiab]) AND ("neck circumference"[tiab] OR "neck girth"[tiab] OR "neck size"[tiab] OR "neck adiposity"[tiab])) AND (("Body Mass Index"[MeSH Terms] OR BMI[tiab] OR "body mass index"[tiab]) OR ("Waist Circumference"[MeSH Terms] OR "waist circumference"[tiab]) OR ("Waist-Hip Ratio"[MeSH Terms] OR "waist hip ratio"[tiab] OR WHR[tiab]) OR "hip circumference"[tiab] OR ("Obesity, Abdominal"[MeSH Terms] OR "central obesity"[tiab] OR "abdominal obesity"[tiab]) OR "Anthropometry"[MeSH Terms] OR anthropometric*[tiab])

("Polycystic Ovary Syndrome"[MeSH Terms] AND Female[MeSH Terms]) AND (Neck[MeSH Terms] OR Anthropometry[MeSH Terms] OR Waist Circumference[MeSH Terms] OR Waist-Hip Ratio[MeSH Terms]) AND (Metabolic Syndrome[MeSH Terms] OR Insulin Resistance[MeSH Terms] OR Blood Pressure[MeSH Terms] OR Triglycerides[MeSH Terms] OR Lipids[MeSH Terms] OR Blood Glucose[MeSH Terms] OR Glucose Tolerance Test[MeSH Terms] OR Dyslipidemias[MeSH Terms])

inclusion_criteria: Observational human studies (cross-sectional, case-control, or cohort) reporting original data.
Population includes adult women (≥18 years) with PCOS diagnosed by established clinical criteria (e.g., Rotterdam, NIH, AE-PCOS); mixed samples eligible if PCOS data are reported separately.
Neck circumference measured as an exposure (continuous or categorized, e.g., larger vs smaller); studies include either non-PCOS healthy controls or within-PCOS comparisons by neck circumference.

Reports at least one eligible outcome: neck circumference values; metabolic syndrome prevalence; insulin resistance markers (HOMA-IR, HOMA%S, fasting insulin); anthropometrics (waist circumference, hip circumference); blood pressure; lipid values (triglycerides); or glucose metabolism parameters (e.g., fasting glucose, OGTT, HbA1c).
exclusion_criteria: Non-observational designs (intervention trials without relevant baseline observational data, case reports/series), reviews, editorials, protocols, non-human studies, or abstracts with insufficient data.

Populations not limited to adult women with PCOS or without separate reporting (e.g., males, adolescents without separate adult data, pregnant/postpartum cohorts, or mixed groups without separate PCOS data).
PCOS diagnosis not specified or based solely on self-report/ICD codes without clinical diagnostic criteria.
Does not measure neck circumference or does not report any eligible outcomes or an appropriate comparison (no non-PCOS controls and no within-PCOS neck circumference comparison/association).
screening_criteria.description: Screen studies assessing associations of neck circumference with metabolic, anthropometric, and cardiometabolic outcomes in adult women with clinically diagnosed PCOS, compared with non-PCOS healthy controls or between PCOS women with larger vs smaller neck circumference.

included_articles.title: Neck Circumference as a Predictor of Obesity and Metabolic Syndrome in Bangladeshi Women with Polycystic Ovary Syndrome.
Neck circumference is a good predictor for insulin resistance in women with polycystic ovary syndrome.
Neck circumference is independently associated with metabolic syndrome in women with polycystic ovary syndrome.
